since_last: 7% of 84 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads -0.13%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 7% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.45% · BTC -1.97% · Gold -1.83% · Nasdaq100 -1.77%. 7% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at -0.13%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -0.13%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -3.23%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +8.81%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +8.81%, BIDU +4.35%, PUBM +2.93%, EQIX +0.16%, SPCX +0.15%. Laggards: MU -5.85%, CEVA -5.52%, MRVL -5.07%, RXRX -4.69%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.15% at $149.69
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.15% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
